title: CSF1R+ myeloid-monocytic cells drive CAR-T cell resistance in aggressive B cell lymphoma
author: Stahl, David
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This archive contains the following datasets presented in   CSF1R+ myeloid-monocytic cells drive CAR-T cell resistance in aggressive B cell lymphoma  : 
 
  adata_scRNAseq-human.h5ad  – Preprocessed human single-cell RNA sequencing dataset. 
  Human_B-NHL_Bulk_RNA_count.csv  – Preprocessed human bulk RNA sequencing dataset. 
  Human_Ex-vivo_DIA_Protein.csv  – Preprocessed protein expression data from human monocytes (D0) and  ex vivo  generated human LAMM cells (D7), derived from four different healthy donors (#7, #8, #9, and #10).
steps_raw:
